summary: Iteration 44 — AI Onboarding Coach for steps 1-6. Backend pytest (13/13 passing) covers extract-step across qbo_link, coa_overrides, plaid_intent, veryfi_intent, ready_confirm, business_profile regression, unknown-step 400, and empty-message 200. Frontend Playwright E2E walked client2@axiom.ai through Bright Beans Coffee Co. onboarding from step 0 → 6 exactly as designed: auto-advances on steps 0, 1, 4, 5; no-auto-advance on steps 2, 3; finish() on step 6 navigates to /accounting/transactions.
critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding.jsx is now 837 lines — consider splitting per-step render blocks into subcomponents.
AiPanel.jsx is 2848 lines — well past the 700-line guideline. Refactor candidate.

The 'ambiguous' branch of qbo_link returns {qbo:'ambiguous'} from the LLM. The frontend only auto-advances on 'yes'/'no' so behaviour is safe, but the schema whitelist stores 'ambiguous' into answers.qbo — consider dropping non-yes/no values server-side to keep the persisted state clean.
seed_data_creation: Reset onboarding_state.step to 0 via PATCH before each E2E run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step pill selector = div.bg-slate-900 with text like '1. Business profile'. AI chat input testid=ai-chat-input, send=ai-chat-send. Auto-advance takes ~2.5s + ~1s LLM latency. Onboarding reset endpoint: PATCH /api/companies/{cid}/onboarding {step:0, complete:false, answers:{}}.
